sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 166 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 4741/24 (discharge of Vakalatnama) 2. For hearing of main case. 24.12.2025 Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, the issue raised in this reference is squarely covered by the Supreme Court judgment dated 03.10.2025 in CPLA No. 3169 of 2022 against the department. He has placed such judgment on record. In view hereof, the reference is hereby dismissed. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
